## Validation

- [ ] Unreal Editor loads the plugin without startup errors
- [ ] Relevant Unreal automation tests pass
- [ ] Manual editor workflow validated
- [ ] MCP bridge `npm install`/dependency install check completed, if relevant
- [ ] MCP bridge npm test/check command completed, if relevant
- [ ] MCP bridge JSON output parses successfully, if relevant
- [ ] Documentation updated or confirmed not needed
- [ ] Logs/screenshots attached or summarized with secrets removed

Validation notes:

```text
Paste sanitized commands, results, logs, or screenshots summary here.
```

## Public Hygiene

- [ ] No private local paths, usernames, machine names, project names, tokens, or API keys
- [ ] No provider transcripts, session state, or generated Unreal folders
- [ ] No stale support/install links or unsupported Marketplace-ready claims
- [ ] New files are valid Markdown/YAML/JSON as applicable
